text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is finally here, and Admire Vega is
helping her class representative, Narita Top
Road, with roll call.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be getting closer to her peers as our
days of preparing for the Kikuka Sho begin.
